ESTIMATED THICKNESSES NOBS=195
Thickness of film 1 = 170.00 nm

ESTIMATED INFLEXION POINTS

Inflexion point of the absorption coefficient of film 1 = 850.00 nm

TRANSMITTANCE WITH THE ESTIMATED THICKNESSES AND OPTICAL PARAMETERS

lambda                     t
4.00000000000000000000e+02 8.17626111572504310487e-01
